jobs.name: Warhammer 40,000: Mechanicus
bulletpoints: Implemented Xbox One specific features on Unity
Optimization to run at 60fps on Xbox One

jobs.name: Double Kick Heroes
bulletpoints: Added a Xbox & UWP backend on a in-house engine
Ported hashlink to the Universal Windows Platform
Ported the online features (including user-generated content) to be XRs compatible

jobs.name: Pile Up! Box by Box
bulletpoints: Level optimization to target 60fps with the Lightweight Render Pipeline
Implemented hot-join compatibility with Xbox Live user account (including achievement handling and save)

jobs.name: Windjammers 2
bulletpoints: Implemented a DirectX 12 backend on a in-house engine
Implemented a new input system on WinGDK with DirectInput to support more controller
Helped making the online-crossplay XRs compatible

jobs.name: Shotgun King: The Final Checkmate
bulletpoints: Restructured the in-house engine to be extensible and modular
Implemented 4 different graphical backends for console support
Implemented gamepad controller on a mouse-only game
Developped new content (tutorial, UI, accessibility features) exclusive to the console port

jobs.name: Big Helmet Heroes
bulletpoints: Optimization to target 30fps on a Nintendo Switch 1 in handheld at full resolution
Implemented single joy-con control
Ported a demo on Xbox Series with save data compatibility and achievement unlocking when buying the full game

jobs.name: MonoGame GDK
bulletpoints: Implemented a new DirectX 12 backend for the MonoGame framework
Used NativeAOT on Xbox Series to run C# code natively
Port of an entire engine with compatibility with already shipped game in mind
Open sourced for developper with an NDA signed with Microsoft

jobs.name: Absolum
bulletpoints: Ported FNA/SDL3 to PS4, including a new graphical backend
Level optimization to target 60fps on Nintendo Switch at full resolution
Implemented level of detail to reduce overdraw and texture atlasing to optimize batching
Replaced the Vulkan backend of SDL3 with NVN to gain perfomance on Nintendo Switch
Implemented online-crossplay with console requirements in mind
Worked on MARVEL Cosmic Invasion (also by Dotemu) in parallel, implemented a consistant build pipeline between productions

jobs.name: MARVEL Cosmic Invasion
bulletpoints: Ported FNA/SDL3 to PS4, including a new graphical backend
Ensured the existing online-crossplay system was compatible with console requirements
Worked on Absolum (also by Dotemu) in parallel, implemented a consistant build pipeline between productions

jobs.name: SDL3 PS4
bulletpoints: Ported SDLGPU to PS4 with shader cross-compilation
Ported PS4 system features to SDL3
Open sourced for developper with an NDA signed with Sony

jobs.name: FNA PS4
bulletpoints: Ported the FNA NativeAOT backend to PS4
Open sourced for developper with an NDA signed with Sony
